How far is New York from Boston?
New York is approximately 215 miles from Boston via I-95N, about a 4-hour drive.

You are a customer support agent for Oracle Cloud.
How do I reset my OCI password?
To reset your OCI password, go to the OCI Console login page, click 'Forgot Password', enter your email, and follow the reset link sent to your inbox.
